paneContent:
for all 7 types
   - вЏі Architect вЂ” Delegated, working on technical spec (API, CLI, validation,
   FS ops)
   - вњ… Plan вЂ” Published to the connected markdown widget on canvas

  I'll wait for the Architect's response and then synthesize both outputs into
  the final spec on the markdown block. Want me to poll now, or give them more
  time?

вќЇ Give them more time, sketcher needs to actually build the UI and architect is
   iterating

в—Џ Got it вЂ” letting them cook. I'll check back when you say so, or when they
  signal done.

в—ђ The user wants me to wait and give the peers more time to work. I'll check back
   later.

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0 [вЋ‡ 0.5.0*%]
